name: revelo
description: Reveal and edit GitHub, Sentry, and Jira issues from references in your code comments and Markdown.

commands.title: Revelo: Create Jira Ticket from TODO

revelo.github.defaultRepo.description: Fallback owner/repo for bare #123 references when no git remote is found.

revelo.sentry.enabled.description: Enable Sentry reference detection. Requires a Sentry token (Revelo: Set Sentry Token).

revelo.sentry.apiBaseUrl.description: Sentry base URL. Use a region host (e.g. https://us.sentry.io, https://de.sentry.io) or your self-hosted URL.

revelo.sentry.orgSlug.description: Default Sentry organization slug, used to resolve short IDs and URLs without an org.

revelo.sentry.shortIdPrefixes.description: Uppercased project slugs to treat as Sentry short IDs (e.g. ["C3-FRONTEND", "CASH-SMARTCASH-HSBC-INTEGRATION"]). Matches the full slug before the issue number. Prevents matching unrelated text like UTF-8.

revelo.sentry.enableEditing.description: Show editing controls (change status) in the Sentry panel. Requires your Sentry token to have the event:write scope.

revelo.jira.enabled.description: Enable Jira reference detection. Requires siteUrl, email, and a token (Revelo: Set Jira Token).

revelo.jira.siteUrl.description: Jira Cloud site URL, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net

revelo.jira.email.description: Atlassian account email, used with the API token for Basic auth.

revelo.jira.projectKeys.description: Project keys to treat as Jira issues (e.g. ["ABC", "PROJ"]). When set, only these prefixes match bare keys — prevents false positives like UTF-8. Leave empty to match any key not on the denylist.

revelo.jira.requireTicketForTodo.description: Warn when a TODO comment has no linked Jira ticket. Offers a quick fix to create one. Requires Jira to be enabled.

revelo.jira.todoKeywords.description: Comment keywords that trigger TODO detection (case-insensitive).

revelo.jira.visibleIssueTypes.description: Restrict the Type dropdown in the create form to these issue type names (e.g. ["Task", "Bug", "Story"]). Leave empty to show all types from Jira. Names are matched case-insensitively.

revelo.jira.visiblePriorities.description: Restrict the Priority dropdown to these priorities, matched by id or name (case-insensitive). Leave empty to show all. Enable revelo.jira.debug to discover priority ids.

revelo.jira.visibleLabels.description: Restrict the Labels suggestion list to these labels. Leave empty to suggest all labels from Jira. Free-text labels are still allowed regardless.

name.description: Label shown in the template picker.

priorityId.description: Priority id to pre-select. Ids are Jira-specific; find them via your Jira instance.

assigneeAccountId.description: Account id of the default assignee.

dueDate.description: Default due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

revelo.jira.ticketTemplates.description: Saved templates that pre-populate the create-from-TODO form. Each needs a `name`; every other field is optional. Example: a "Bug" template with a fixed project, priority, parent and labels.

revelo.jira.prefetchEpicsMaxProjects.description: Prefetch epics at startup for each configured projectKey, but only when there are at most this many keys (avoids a burst of requests for large lists). Set to 0 to disable epic prefetching.

revelo.jira.debug.description: Show internal Jira ids (priority, assignee) in the create-from-TODO form. Use it to discover the ids to put in ticketTemplates, then turn it off.

revelo.cache.ttlSeconds.description: How long fetched reference details are cached, in seconds.

scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node rolldown.config.mjs --production
